calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Sep-26-2012 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-26-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Luz Hotel is present.
Attorney, Malcolm McCloskey is appearing for the plaintiff. Represented by, Virgilio Candar.
Defendant Jennifer Decalos is present and appearing with Limited Scope Attorney,Kristin Messer.

The Judge Pro Tem Karen Kwong, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of October 01, 2012 is vacated.
